description_long: This is a medium-sized plastic bucket with a fitted lid, decorated in a patriotic theme featuring red, white, and blue stripes and stars reminiscent of the American flag. The lid is white with bold blue text reading 'BUCKET O SOLDIERS' and a military-style insignia in the center. The bucket has a white plastic bail handle attached to the rim, allowing for easy carrying. The sides of the bucket display circular emblems with the same 'BUCKET O SOLDIERS' text and insignia, reinforcing its thematic design. The surface appears slightly matte with some subtle texture, and the bucket is likely hollow inside, intended to store or transport small items. This object would commonly be found in urban or suburban settings, possibly as a toy container or novelty item.
description: A medium plastic bucket with a patriotic red, white, and blue design, fitted with a white lid and a bail handle. The bucket features 'BUCKET O SOLDIERS' text and military insignia on both the lid and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bucket's lid with 'BUCKET O SOLDIERS' text and insignia, and the main emblem on the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white plastic bail handle and more of the star-spangled design wrapping around the bucket.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle fully visible and the bucket's circular emblem and colorful pattern clearly displayed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle attachment and a large section of the red, white, and blue star pattern.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: 'BUCKET O SOLDIERS' text, military insignia, stars and stripes pattern
